name: openrouter-fusion
description: Call OpenRouter Fusion (multi-model deliberation) via async fusion_start / fusion_result, with named configs (quality / budget / custom).
long_description: Exposes OpenRouter Fusion as MCP tools. fusion_list enumerates the available configs (built-in quality and budget, plus any named custom config set via OPENROUTER_FUSION_<NAME> env vars), each carrying a panel, a judge, a reasoning effort and a temperature. fusion_start runs a deliberation in the background and returns a job_id; fusion_result long-polls it. Fusion runs a panel of models in parallel, then a judge synthesizes the best answer.

tools.name: fusion_list
tools.description: List the available Fusion configs (panel, judge, reasoning, temperature).

tools.name: fusion_start
tools.description: Start a Fusion deliberation in the background; returns a job_id.

tools.name: fusion_result
tools.description: Long-poll a fusion_start job_id for the synthesized answer.

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API Key
openrouter_api_key.description: Your OpenRouter API key (sk-or-...). Get one at https://openrouter.ai/keys
